rationale: Art. VIII, §29 prohibits transfer taxes on real property conveyances. The proposed change alters a homestead property-tax exemption amount, which is unrelated to transfer taxes on conveyance transactions.
quote: (a) After January 1, 2016, no law may be enacted that imposes a transfer tax on a transaction that conveys fee simple title to real property.
_note: No conflict. The constitutional provision addresses transfer taxes on conveyances; the proposed change modifies a property-tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b).
